content.json:
# 🔍 Azure OpenAI Monitoring Dashboard
Real-time monitoring for all Azure OpenAI resources across the subscription.

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAIRequests"
| summarize Value = sum(Total)
| extend Label = "Total Requests"

AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "TokenTransaction"
| summarize Value = sum(Total)
| extend Label = "Total Tokens"

AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAITimeToResponse"
| summarize Value = round(avg(Average), 1)
| extend Label = "Avg Latency (ms)"

AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend statusCode = toint(ResultSignature)
| summarize Value = round(100.0 * countif(statusCode >= 400) / count(), 2)
| extend Label = "Error Rate %"

AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAIRequests"
| summarize Requests = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
content.title: Requests Over Time

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAIRequests"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, '/')[8])
| summarize Requests = sum(Total) by ResourceName
| order by Requests desc
content.title: Requests by Resource

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend StatusCode = tostring(toint(ResultSignature))
| summarize Count = count() by StatusCode
| order by Count desc
content.title: Status Code Distribution

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName in ("ProcessedPromptTokens", "GeneratedTokens")
| summarize Tokens = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), MetricName
| extend TokenType = case(MetricName == "ProcessedPromptTokens", "Prompt Tokens", MetricName == "GeneratedTokens", "Completion Tokens", MetricName)
| project TimeGenerated, TokenType, Tokens
content.title: Token Usage Over Time (Prompt vs Completion)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| where isnotempty(OperationName)
| summarize Requests = count() by OperationName
| order by Requests desc
| take 10
content.title: Top Operations by Request Count

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, "/")[8])
| summarize Requests = count() by ResourceName
| order by Requests desc
content.title: Requests by Resource (Logs)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAITimeToResponse"
| summarize AvgLatency = avg(Average), MaxLatency = max(Maximum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
content.title: Latency Over Time (Avg / Max)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| where isnotempty(DurationMs) and isnotempty(OperationName)
| summarize P50 = round(percentile(DurationMs, 50), 1), P95 = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 1), P99 = round(percentile(DurationMs, 99), 1) by OperationName
| order by P95 desc
| take 10
content.title: Latency Percentiles by Operation (ms)

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where MetricName == "AzureOpenAITimeToResponse"
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, '/')[8])
| summarize AvgLatency = round(avg(Average), 1), MaxLatency = round(max(Maximum), 1) by ResourceName
| order by AvgLatency desc
content.title: Latency by Resource (ms)

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend statusCode = toint(ResultSignature)
| summarize
    ClientErrors = countif(statusCode >= 400 and statusCode < 500),
    ServerErrors = countif(statusCode >= 500),
    TotalRequests = count()
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend ErrorRate = round(100.0 * (ClientErrors + ServerErrors) / TotalRequests, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, ClientErrors, ServerErrors, ErrorRate
content.title: Error Rate Over Time

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend statusCode = toint(ResultSignature)
| where statusCode >= 400
| summarize Count = count() by StatusCode = tostring(statusCode)
| order by Count desc
content.title: Error Count by Status Code

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category == "RequestResponse"
| extend statusCode = toint(ResultSignature)
| where statusCode >= 400
| extend ResourceName = tostring(split(_ResourceId, '/')[8])
| summarize Errors = count() by ResourceName
| order by Errors desc
content.title: Errors by Resource
